project: PRJ03261 - SLB - SLB Denmark - HBA21 (HBA-21)_HBA11 (HBA-11) - MFC
comment:
SLB continuing with Hand jarring down to TRSSSV with 4.6” broach then Run 4.65” GC before pulling Safety Valve.
Current look ahead has MFC Monday morning

comment: Archer returned the MFC80 kit yesterday, 13-May-26

project: PRJ03261 - SLB - SLB Denmark - HBA21 (HBA-21)_HBA11 (HBA-11) - MFC
comment: Rigged up onto HBA-06. RIH with 4.65" Gauge Cutter and hung up @89ft so have been hand-jarring since. Reached ~700ft and currently in hole with the 4.5" I-broach. Injecting the Well every 100ft. Latest lookahed for MFC Sunday Evening. LL cc with JC today.

project: PRJ03261 - SLB - SLB Denmark - HBA21 (HBA-21)_HBA11 (HBA-11) - MFC
